rulings.Case Title: JOVICA MAKSIMOVIC et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECONTRUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Return Of Excess Funds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 29, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFF JOVICA MAKSIMOVIC, DANICA MAKSIMOVIC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Return Of Excess Funds is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court shall release $2,500 plus interest, if any, to the Plaintiff. $2,500 deposited with the Court on February 4, 2013, TAG # 031509. Moving party to provide an order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RAJEEV SHEGAL ET AL VS. FOREST CITY RESIDENRIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 29, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT BROOKFIELD PROPERTIES, BAYSIDE VILLAGE, FOREST CITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. CRC 3.1350(b) and (d). Additionally, triable issues of fact exist. e.g. Plaintiff's Additional fact 3. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS B. BISHOP VS. KALVIN L. BISHOP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 29, 2021 line 3. PLAINTIFF DENNIS BISHOP Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JIAN HUI HUANG ET AL VS. KIET VAN NGO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 29, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT KIET NGO, DUYEN TRUONG DEMURRER to COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. =(501/CFH)
